name: Quanta Services / Quanta Services
sector: Utility and grid infrastructure services / 公用事业与电网工程服务
summary: Quanta Services 提供电网、公用事业和能源基础设施工程服务，是 AI 数据中心电力接入和电网升级的施工服务层。 / Quanta Services provides electric-grid, utility, and energy-infrastructure services, sitting in the construction-services layer for AI data-center power access and grid upgrades.
summaryZh: Quanta Services 提供电网、公用事业和能源基础设施工程服务，是 AI 数据中心电力接入和电网升级的施工服务层。
summaryEn: Quanta Services provides electric-grid, utility, and energy-infrastructure services, sitting in the construction-services layer for AI data-center power access and grid upgrades.

business.thesis: 如果 AI 数据中心扩张卡在电网接入和输配电建设，Quanta 的价值在于工程交付能力，而非设备或芯片。 / If AI data-center expansion is constrained by grid interconnection and transmission/distribution buildout, Quanta's value lies in engineering delivery rather than equipment or chips.
business.thesisZh: 如果 AI 数据中心扩张卡在电网接入和输配电建设，Quanta 的价值在于工程交付能力，而非设备或芯片。
business.thesisEn: If AI data-center expansion is constrained by grid interconnection and transmission/distribution buildout, Quanta's value lies in engineering delivery rather than equipment or chips.
riskNotes: 项目延迟、劳动力成本和公用事业资本开支周期会影响业绩。 / Project delays, labor costs, and utility capex cycles affect results.
AI 数据中心相关订单需与传统电网需求区分。 / AI data-center related orders need to be separated from traditional grid demand.

failureConditions.condition: AI 数据中心电力/散热订单或 backlog 没有继续改善。
failureConditions.conditionZh: AI 数据中心电力/散热订单或 backlog 没有继续改善。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if AI data-center power/cooling orders or backlog stop improving.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪订单、backlog、数据中心客户披露、交付周期和项目毛利率。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪订单、backlog、数据中心客户披露、交付周期和项目毛利率。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor orders, backlog, data-center customer disclosures, delivery lead times, and project margins.

failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if grid interconnection and power projects lag data-center buildout needs.

failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪公用事业资本开支、项目审批、变压器/配电交付和客户开工节奏。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor utility capex, project approvals, transformer/distribution delivery, and customer construction starts.

supplyChain.thesis: 如果 AI 数据中心扩张卡在电网接入和输配电建设，Quanta 的价值在于工程交付能力，而非设备或芯片。 / If AI data-center expansion is constrained by grid interconnection and transmission/distribution buildout, Quanta's value lies in engineering delivery rather than equipment or chips.
supplyChain.thesisZh: 如果 AI 数据中心扩张卡在电网接入和输配电建设，Quanta 的价值在于工程交付能力，而非设备或芯片。
supplyChain.thesisEn: If AI data-center expansion is constrained by grid interconnection and transmission/distribution buildout, Quanta's value lies in engineering delivery rather than equipment or chips.

scarceLayers.name: 数据中心电力接入与配电
scarceLayers.nameZh: 数据中心电力接入与配电
scarceLayers.whyScarce: AI 数据中心扩张需要可用电力、变压器、配电设备和工程交付，扩容周期往往长于服务器采购。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: AI 数据中心扩张需要可用电力、变压器、配电设备和工程交付，扩容周期往往长于服务器采购。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: AI data-center expansion requires available power, transformers, distribution equipment, and engineering delivery, often on longer cycles than server procurement.

themeExposure.rationale: 如果数据中心扩张卡在电网接入和输配电建设，工程交付能力会成为关键约束。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 如果数据中心扩张卡在电网接入和输配电建设，工程交付能力会成为关键约束。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: If data-center expansion is constrained by grid interconnection and transmission/distribution buildout, engineering delivery becomes a key constraint.
